task: Review whether a trace has enough evidence to trust a blue-object transformation.
observed_evidence: Training example A maps a blue block to the bottom-right corner.
Training example B maps another blue block to the bottom-right corner.
Training example C shows the shape stays constant during the move.
actions: Apply the blue-block rule to the test grid, but do not check whether size or object order changes the rule.
hypothesis: Blue blocks move to the bottom-right corner.
final_answer: Move the blue block to the bottom-right corner.

dissent.claim: The trace did not test plausible alternatives: size-dependent transformation, object-order transformation
